input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.6.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.6.2.2
            TITLE: if the operating condition changes to wet during endurance, the track will be red flagged or

            CONTENT:
            rule D.6.2.2: If the Operating Condition changes to Wet during Endurance, the track will be Red Flagged or
D.6.2.2 If the Operating Condition changes to Wet during Endurance, the track will be Red Flagged or 
vehicles will be Black Flagged and brought into the Driver Change Area

final_answer: If the Operating Condition changes to Wet during Endurance, the track will be Red Flagged or vehicles will be Black Flagged and brought into the Driver Change Area
